description:
Recto: Draft of a letter from Fustat to Daniel b. Azarya, concerning "tarima" - a room or apartment, made of wood, that was added to the house's top floor. The writer complains against Ali b. Amram. Datting: ca. 1060 CE (Gil's estimate). 

Verso: Letter in Arabic script. Quite faded. Mentions Abū l-Manṣūr Ghālib. In the margins there are accounts. (Information in part from CUDL) VMR
tags: Daniel b. Azarya, draft, complaints, Eli b. Amram
description_he: טיוטת מכתב מפוסטאט לדניאל בן עזריה על 'תרימה' (תוספת עץ לקומה עליונה). מתלונן על עלי בן עמרם. כ-1060.
